content.title: I will claim Social Security early. Why do so few people talk about the elephant in the room?
content.summary: “The strongest argument for claiming benefits earlier goes beyond the traditional break-even analyses.”

content.title: Why it’s time to retire the Magnificent Seven as a stock-market talking point, say these strategists
content.summary: Magnificent Seven as a group is underperforming the broader market this year, but strategists at Citi argue it’s no longer a grouping that even makes sense to think about it.

content.title: My husband and I are retired. Our financial adviser, who is in his 30s, called us ‘you guyses.’ Is that unprofessional?
content.summary: “I’m wondering whether I should ask to work with someone closer to our generation.”

content.title: Is an opportunity to buy chip stocks nearing? These two big Wall Street banks are divided.
content.summary: JPMorgan says a summer buying opportunity is coming for chip stocks, but Morgan Stanley says the sector is in for a hard remainder of 2026.

content.title: Inflation is broadening out, says Goldman economist
content.summary: During his Congressional testimony last week, new Fed Chair Kevin Warsh emphasized that one of his primary responsibilities was to ensure that individual price spikes, of which there have been many in recent years, “don’t broaden out.” The bad news is that on the whole they are.

content.title: We have $8 million in traditional IRAs. Should we tap them to buy a house — and take the tax hit?
content.summary: “We would rather pay taxes upfront than pay mortgage interest.”

content.title: If history is a guide, there’s still another week before earnings will start to move the stock market
content.summary: The S&P 500 is primed to climb during the third, fourth and fifth weeks of the financial reporting period, according to Jefferies.

content.title: Sean ‘Diddy’ Combs sells $55 million Miami mansion he tried to use for bail
content.summary: Disgraced music mogul Sean “Diddy” Combs has finally sold the Miami mansion he once put up as collateral in his failed bid for bail in his sex-trafficking case. It was sold for $55 million while he was behind bars.

content.title: ‘Full House’ creator Jeff Franklin relists $45 million Beverly Hills home built on site of Manson murders
content.summary: “Full House” creator Jeff Franklin is once again on the hunt for a buyer for his Beverly Hills mansion which has sinister ties to the Charles Manson murders.
